arts.ttl: Nuno wins SIXTH Barclays Manager of the Month award
arts.sum: Nuno took Forest to second in the Premier League table for the first time since 1994, with five wins from six December matches, including three consecutive clean sheets to end the month. Nottingham Forest head coach Nuno wins the award for the second time in three months and for the sixth time overall in his Premier League career.
